display.purpose: Hero headlines sur la landing page uniquement.

headline.purpose: Titres de section sur la landing page. Jamais dans le dashboard.

title.purpose: Titres de page, titres de modal, headers de section dans le dashboard.

body.purpose: Tout le texte courant. Max 65-75ch sur les surfaces marketing.

label.purpose: Texte des boutons, labels de formulaire, headers de tableau, texte de nav.

caption.purpose: Timestamps, métadonnées, fine print. Jamais pour l'information primaire.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Cartes et conteneurs au repos. Presque invisible. Séparation sans poids visuel.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Cartes survolées, dropdowns, popovers. Séparation claire de la surface.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialogues et drawers plein écran. Le ring de 1px prévient le saignement sur fond blanc.

shadows.name: focus
shadows.purpose: Focus ring clavier sur tous les éléments interactifs. Indicateur universel du système.

motion.name: exit
motion.purpose: Éléments qui quittent l'écran (drawer close, toast dismiss).

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Écran de référence mobile. Design jugé ici en premier.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Breakpoint principal. Master-detail layout s'active ici.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.purpose: Layout large. Sidebar + main content + detail panel.

components.name: Bouton Primaire
components.description: Action principale de la page. Un seul par écran.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #1a4d2e; color: #ffffff; padding: 9px 18px; min-height: 44px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #16a34a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(26,77,46,0.30); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Bouton Ghost
components.description: Action secondaire. Toujours en complément d'un bouton primaire, jamais seul.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background-color: transparent; color: #1a4d2e; padding: 9px 18px; min-height: 44px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #1a4d2e; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #f6f9fc; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(26,77,46,0.30); }

components.name: Bouton Danger
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background-color: #df1b41; color: #ffffff; padding: 9px 18px; min-height: 44px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background-color: #b91334; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(223,27,65,0.30); }

components.name: Carte
components.description: Conteneur standard. Fond blanc sur surface grise.
components.html:
Titre

Contenu de la carte.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e6eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0px 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), 0px 3px 6px rgba(18,42,66,0.02); transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 5px 0 rgba(50,50,93,0.10), 0 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.07); border-color: #c8d2da; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #30313d; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; color: #6b7c93; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Champ de saisie
components.description: Input texte standard. 4px radius (Stripe-strict). 44px minimum de hauteur.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #30313d; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input { height: 44px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #30313d; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e6eb; border-radius: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8898aa; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #1a4d2e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(26,77,46,0.30); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f4f5f6; color: #8898aa; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Badge Statut
components.description: Indicateur de statut de commande. Pill 20px, 5 états.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--pending { background: #f4f5f6; color: #8898aa; } .ds-badge--preparing { background: #fff8e6; color: #b45309; } .ds-badge--ready { background: #e8f0fd; color: #2e6da4; } .ds-badge--delivered { background: #ecfdf5; color: #16a34a; } .ds-badge--cancelled { background: #fef2f2; color: #df1b41; }

components.name: Carte Commande (urgence neutre)
components.description: Carte commande au repos. Attente < 5 minutes.
components.css: .ds-order-card { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e6eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-order-card--neutral { background: #ffffff; border-color: #e0e6eb; } .ds-order-card--amber { background: #fffbeb; border-color: #fde68a; } .ds-order-card--red { background: #fef2f2; border-color: #fecaca; } .ds-order-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 5px 0 rgba(50,50,93,0.10), 0 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.07); } .ds-order-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(26,77,46,0.30); } .ds-order-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-order-id { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #30313d; } .ds-order-timer { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #8898aa; } .ds-order-card--amber .ds-order-timer { color: #b45309; } .ds-order-card--red .ds-order-timer { color: #dc2626; } .ds-order-client { font-size: 13px; color: #6b7c93; margin-bottom: 10px; }

components.name: KPI Card
components.description: Carte métrique du dashboard. Dot coloré en lieu de border-left.
components.html:
24
Commandes aujourd'hui
components.css: .ds-kpi { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e6eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px 20px; box-shadow: 0px 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), 0px 3px 6px rgba(18,42,66,0.02); } .ds-kpi-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-kpi-dot--brand { background: #1a4d2e; } .ds-kpi-dot--amber { background: #b45309; } .ds-kpi-dot--danger { background: #df1b41; } .ds-kpi-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: #30313d; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-kpi-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7c93; }

narrative.overview:
RestoFlow's visual system is built like a well-designed cash register: every element is there because it does a job. Nothing decorates. Nothing performs. The owner of a maquis in Bamako opens the dashboard mid-service, glances at the screen, takes an action, and goes back to the grill. The interface should never make them think about the interface.

The system is product-register first. On the dashboard (/[restaurantId]/*), color is information, not branding. Green means action. Amber means wait. Red means act now. The landing page (/) is the one place where brand energy is permitted; everywhere else the goal is clarity at a glance.

This system rejects everything it doesn't need. No purple-blue SaaS gradients. No 'Supercharge your workflow' energy. No telco palette (MTN yellow, Orange red, Wave blue-purple). No generic dark dashboard with colored sidebar chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Functional density over breathing room — information per pixel matters on a phone screen
Color as signal, never decoration — four color roles, each with a distinct job
One obvious next action per screen — hierarchy through layout, not decoration
Ambient shadows, flat at rest — elevation only on modals and drawers
System sans typography — no web fonts loaded; renders in under 50ms on 3G

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Vert Confiance Profond (#1a4d2e) appears on 10% or less of any given screen. One primary button, one active nav item, one focus ring. Its scarcity is what makes it trustworthy.

rules.name: The Four-Color Signal Rule
rules.body: The urgency system uses exactly four states: neutral (white), mild urgency (amber #fffbeb), high urgency (red #fef2f2), and resolved (white again). No additional tints.

rules.name: The No-Web-Font Rule
rules.body: Never add a Google Fonts or Typekit import. The system sans stack renders correctly and instantly on every device in the target market.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body text on marketing surfaces caps at 65-75ch per line. On desktop enforce max-width: 65ch on paragraph containers.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, lift, focus) or layer (modal above page).

dos: Do use box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(26,77,46,0.30) on every :focus-visible state.
Do use min-height: 44px on every interactive element.
Do keep Vert Confiance Profond (#1a4d2e) on 10% or less of screen surface.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion: reduce to disable all CSS transitions and animations.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings (H1, H2, H3).
Do express urgency through background and border color (amber/red tints), not through additional icons.
Do use the system sans font stack only. Never introduce a web font import.
Do distinguish page background (#f6f9fc) from card background (#ffffff).
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use purple, blue, or gradient-heavy palettes. RestoFlow is not a generic US SaaS.
Don't use MTN yellow, Orange red, or Wave blue-purple.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradient fills.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter blur) as a default surface treatment.
Don't build KPI cards with border-left: 3px solid [accent].
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't reach for a modal as the first solution.
Don't load fonts from Google Fonts, Typekit, or any CDN.
Don't use transition: all anywhere in the codebase.
